query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscribedAt < '2026-05-10 00:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lista1_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscribedAt >= '2026-05-10 00:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lista2_count,
  COUNT(*) as totale
FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscribedAt < '2026-05-10 00:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lista1_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscribedAt >= '2026-05-10 00:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lista2_count,
  COUNT(*) as totale
FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active';
